message:
feat: add session metadata persistence layer

SessionMetadata class manages per-session JSON metadata files
(.meta.json) for quick listing and state tracking. Sessions are
permanent — no cleanup or TTL. Includes loadSessionMetadata for
reading individual snapshots and listSessions for scanning a
directory sorted by ULID filename order.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
